mapper.sql: select oper_id, title, business_type, method, request_method, operator_type, oper_name, dept_name, oper_url, oper_ip, oper_location, oper_param, status, error_msg, oper_time, cost_time from sys_oper_log
mapper.insert: insert into sys_oper_log(title, business_type, method, request_method, operator_type, oper_name, dept_name, unit_id, oper_url, oper_ip, oper_location, oper_param, status, error_msg, cost_time, oper_time) values (#{title}, #{businessType}, #{method}, #{requestMethod}, #{operatorType}, #{operName}, #{deptName},#{unitId}, #{operUrl}, #{operIp}, #{operLocation}, #{operParam}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{costTime}, sysdate())
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_oper_log where oper_id in
#{operId}
mapper.select: SELECT date_dim.day as day, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT sol.oper_id), 0) as total_count FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) as day UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 DAY) as day UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 4 DAY) as day UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) as day UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY) as day UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) as day UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() as day ) date_dim LEFT JOIN sys_oper_log sol ON DATE_FORMAT(sol.oper_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_dim.day AND sol.unit_id = #{unitId} AND sol.oper_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY date_dim.day ORDER BY date_dim.day
